🌆 Market News Digest  
May 13, 2026 EST

🔥 Top Stories  
• US stock indices hit new highs amid inflation concerns — S&P 500 reaches record 7,450, driven by tech gains and inflation data.  
• US Treasury yields spike on hot PPI data — 10-year yields rise to 4.49% on inflation fears.  
• Iran claims control of Hormuz Strait will double oil revenues — Iran emphasizes strategic control to boost economy and foreign policy power.  
• China’s President Xi and Trump meet in Beijing — Summit unlikely to ease Iran or trade tensions, focus on stability.  
• NVIDIA hits $5.5 trillion market cap — First company to reach this milestone, driven by AI and chip demand.

⛽ Oil & Energy  
• OPEC cuts 2026 oil demand forecast to 1.17 million BPD — World demand slightly lowered amid supply concerns.  
• US crude inventories fall sharply — Record weekly drawdown of 4.3 million barrels, Brent and WTI extend gains.  
• Iran’s control of Hormuz could generate $2x oil revenues — Iran highlights strategic importance of Strait.  
• Saudi and Gulf states prepare for regional escalation — Strikes on Iran-backed militias in Iraq; tensions rise.

📊 Markets & Macro  
• US inflation surges; PPI at 6% YOY — Unexpectedly hot inflation data prompts rate hike expectations.  
• Fed officials signal prolonged high rates — Collins and Kashkari warn of persistent inflation, energy shocks, and supply shocks.  
• UK and Canada consider monetary policy adjustments — UK rate steady; Canada’s minutes show potential for hikes if oil stays high.  
• Global AI investment to reach $5T by 2030 — McKinsey projects rapid growth in data center spending.  
• US job market remains resilient — Low unemployment, steady productivity, but rising economic concerns.

🌍 Geopolitical  
• Iran’s nuclear progress alarming; close to weapons-grade uranium — US officials warn Iran may be weeks away.  
• Kuwait detains Iranian nationals; Iran demands release — Tensions in Persian Gulf escalate.  
• US and China weigh tariffs and diplomatic moves — Trump-Xi summit limited; trade talks ongoing.  
• Russia modernizes nuclear forces; develops missile systems — Continuing strategic military buildup.  
• Iran and regional conflicts impact oil markets — Strait of Hormuz closure risks and regional strikes.

🪙 Crypto & DeFi  
• Bitcoin dips below $79,000 amid market volatility — Investors cautious as regulatory and geopolitical risks persist.  
• Crypto market sentiment shows fear — Index at 42/100, heightened caution.  
• Ledger pauses US IPO plans due to market conditions — Crypto security firm delays offering amid uncertainty.  
• Tether CEO: Clarity on crypto regulation coming — Market awaits clearer frameworks.  
• Crypto investor profits hit highest since June 2025 — Unrealized margins at 17.7%.

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy  
• US Congress debates Iran War Powers resolution — Moves to limit presidential authority, but fails to pass.  
• UK and US consider subsidy cuts and tariffs — UK to cut €3B; US explores tariff extensions and trade truce.  
• IMF warns high oil prices risk recession — Sustained $120+ per barrel could slow global growth.  
• US DOJ investigates oil market trading — Potential price manipulation probes underway.  
• China’s hidden $3T bad debt threatens economy — Long-term risks loom over growth prospects.

🏢 Corporate  
• Microsoft invests $100B in OpenAI partnership — Expanding AI infrastructure and services.  
• Cisco raises FY26 revenue and EPS forecasts — Strong Q3 results, optimistic outlook.  
• Fed’s second tokenized money market fund launched on Ethereum — Innovation in financial markets.  
• GameStop CEO renews bid to acquire eBay — Criticizes eBay’s structure, pushes for consolidation.  
• Inception hires bank for $1B deal; Microsoft considered acquisition — Strategic moves in AI startups.
